_README: Gate A reference fingerprints. Each value is a sorted list of opaque k-gram SHA-1[:12] hashes of the STRUCTURE-ONLY AST node-type token stream (only type(node).__name__ plus nesting brackets; identifiers, attribute names and every literal value erased; docstrings stripped) of a pyhOn connection module. NO pyhOn source, identifiers or literal values are stored here -- only structural hashes -- so this reference is itself non-derivative. Regenerate with tests/independence/_fingerprint.py against a pyhOn checkout if the generator (k or the node-type normalization) changes. The node-type walk emits no ast.dump text, so a reference frozen on one CPython release (3.14 here) reproduces byte-for-byte on the CI interpreter (3.13); test_reference_fingerprints_are_populated guards against an emptied reference.
